intro.description: Hi, I am Anwesha, a final year undergraduate student, majoring in Computer Science and Engineering. With a passion for system design and architecture, I have honed my skills through various projects and collaborations. My journey in the tech world has been fueled by curiosity and a relentless drive to learn and innovate. I am excited to share my work and connect with like-minded individuals who are passionate about technology and its potential to transform the world.

websiteSection.designedBy: Designed from the idea of Miranda website theme! Formulated on a JSON parse architechture for quick data edits. Designed by @elixpo and edited by @anwesha
websiteSection.futurePlans: Moving forward with the dream of grasping system architectures and design, I am eager to explore the depths of scalable systems, distributed computing, and cloud technologies. My goal is to contribute to innovative projects that push the boundaries of technology and create impactful solutions for real-world problems. I am excited to continue learning, growing, and collaborating with talented individuals in the tech community.
websiteSection.codeStory: A former biology enthusiast, slowly turned into a CS Major working on system design and archirechture. Learning concepts of the design and technological gain was the most interesting part of the game so far! diving deep into the topics and the scales of the vast serving of CS and the fast growing technological scope is really awesome but sometimes tiring. But with the advent of time and love for the subject, moving forwrd with the choice of transfer and change is quite fun. Neverthless wish to explore more and push forward some awesome projects down the line with Elixpo and Computer Science ~ Wish me Luck :D

techSection.description: A system design enthusiast who views every codebase as an uncharted territory. From dissecting complex biological patterns to mapping out scalable software infrastructures, Anwesha builds with the precision of a scientist and the curiosity of a global traveler.
